description_long: This is a pair of high-top athletic sneakers, predominantly black and white in color, with a classic basketball silhouette. The shoes feature a smooth leather upper with black overlays on the toe, eyelets, heel, and Swoosh, contrasted by white panels on the sides and toe box. The midsole is white, while the outsole is black, providing a bold visual separation. The shoes have a standard criss-cross lacing system with black laces and padded collars for ankle support. On the lateral side, there is a prominent white winged basketball logo, and the tongue displays a Jumpman logo. The overall appearance is clean, structured, and indicative of a premium, urban streetwear style.
description: A pair of high-top black and white leather sneakers with criss-cross laces, padded collars, and prominent branding details.
description_view_0: Front view showing the symmetrical toe boxes, lacing, and tongue logos of both shoes.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the black Swoosh, white winged logo, and layered leather construction.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the padded collars, heel tabs, and the back seam details of both shoes.
description_view_3: Right side view mirroring the left, with clear visibility of the Swoosh and winged logo.
attribute_logo: White winged basketball logo on the lateral side and white Jumpman logo on the tongue.
